seoTitle: Kiacatoo vs Kiama — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kiacatoo and Kiama. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kiacatoo and Kiama.
heading: Kiacatoo vs Kiama — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kiacatoo, New South Wales and Kiama, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kiacatoo has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kiama (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kiacatoo or Kiama safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kiacatoo has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Kiama scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kiacatoo scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Kiama scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kiacatoo or Kiama?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kiacatoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
